summary: Add a migration notice for the stream field's default behavior change from raw audio to SSE to avoid breaking downstream users.
Add an inline comment in is_sse_stream() to document that raw audio takes precedence over SSE when both stream=True and stream_format='audio' are set.
Add a comment clarifying that streaming overrides response_format to PCM regardless of user input.
Update the word_timestamps rejection error message to mention that SSE streaming also lacks support, not just the WebSocket path.
